texto: No more kissing beneath bridges?"Her face heated. She turned to go only to have him catch her sleeve. It was a risk, having such long sleeves."Why don't we both stay back here? No one will miss us and you're the most interesting part of the banquet anyway.""Shameless," she scolded.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Jeannie Lin que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “No more kissing beneath bridges?"Her face heated. She turned to go only to have him catch her sle…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, metaphor, kissing, com foco em reflexao.
